title: UndertakingInvolvementTypeValues
description: Role played by a party in the context of an undertaking or in the context of the business linked to the undertaking. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Undertaking Advising Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party that advises the undertaking at the request of the issuer. For further clarification, reference the applicable rules to which the undertaking is subject. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Undertaking Applicant
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party named in an undertaking as the party on whose behalf the undertaking is issued. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Undertaking Beneficiary
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party in whose favour the undertaking (or counter-undertaking) is issued. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Undertaking Confirmer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party that adds its confirmation to the undertaking.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Undertaking Instructing Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party that instructs the issuance of the undertaking. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Undertaking Issuer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party that issues the undertaking (or counter-undertaking). (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Undertaking Obligor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party obligated to reimburse the issuer. (ISO20022)
